verdict: An elegant hydration serum combining dual-molecular weight hyaluronic acid with panthenol for deep moisture penetration and skin barrier support. Clean formulation with excellent safety profile justifies its top rating.

_research.name: The Ordinary Hyaluronic Acid 2% + B5
pros: Dual HA molecular weights for multi-layer hydration
High review rating (4.4★) with strong user satisfaction
_research.con: Requires layering with occlusives in very dry climates for maximum benefit.
